_meta.source: World Bank Commodity Markets Pink Sheet (https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/74e8be41ceb20fa0da750cda2f6b9e4e-0050012026/related/CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly.xlsx)
_meta.notes: Monthly nominal USD benchmark prices parsed from the World Bank Pink Sheet historical workbook. Used for commodity cards and live market benchmarks. | v21 in-place patch (May 2026): synthetic 60-month `history` backfilled per series using a seeded random walk ending at previous_value / latest_value. Sparklines are illustrative until the next refresh_worldbank_pink_sheet.py run, which writes real history from the WB Pink Sheet workbook.
